creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2010-10-21 06:46:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/wsdlpull         Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    www/wsdlpull/files   patch-src__xmlpull__XmlUtils.cpp 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.24
  
  Changes:
    * Generate single empty tag for nillable complex elements i.e <name/>
      instead of <name><fname/><lname/></name>
    * Pass the correct schema parser when types are imported
    * Options to parse schemas from the web/filesystem
    * Thread safety fixes while fetching temp files
    * Updated AUTHORS.txt file
  
  PR:             ports/151557
  Submitted by:   KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>
  Approved by:    pgollucci (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.34      +16 -14    ports/www/wsdlpull/Makefile
  1.18      +3 -3      ports/www/wsdlpull/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/www/wsdlpull/files/patch-src__xmlpull__XmlUtils.cpp (dead)
  1.8       +46 -57    ports/www/wsdlpull/pkg-plist
